creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 231139
py-django-haystack-3.1.1.patch

Hi,

attached is a patch that updates www/py-django-haystack to 3.1.1.  It also introduces a new default option ELASTIC to enable support for Elasticsearch and to reflect the requirements in the "setup.py".

QA:
~~~
- poudriere -> OK (12.2-RELEASE amd64, py37, py38, py39, py310, py311)
